name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or change
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

<!-- What user problem does this solve? Whose problem? Why now? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Sketch of the approach. Don't pre-commit to an implementation. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think about? Why is the proposed option better? -->

## Affected areas

- [ ] Customer enrollment flow
- [ ] Authentication / fingerprint matching
- [ ] Payment / Stripe integration
- [ ] Stripe Connect / merchant payouts
- [ ] Merchant dashboard
- [ ] Customer self-service portal
- [ ] POS / WebSocket
- [ ] Database schema
- [ ] Operations / CI / deploy
- [ ] Documentation only

## Open questions

<!-- What needs to be decided before this can move forward? -->

## Definition of done

<!-- How will we know this is shipped correctly? -->

---

If this is non-trivial (touches more than one module, changes a public
contract, requires a new dependency, or has security implications) please
also draft an RFC under `docs/rfc/` using `docs/rfc/TEMPLATE.md`.
